description: Golden graph and query truth snapshot for the B-7 end-to-end corpus gate. B-7 diffs a live run against this file. Update this file under review when intentional graph behaviour changes; never update silently.
tolerance_policy: count ranges are [min, max] inclusive; a live run outside the range fails B-7(b). required_correlations assertions must all pass; a missing edge fails B-7(b). query_shapes define required response fields; a missing field fails B-7(c).

Repository.note: 20 corpus repos; may include additional discovered mirror stubs

File.note: all source files parsed across the deterministic 20-repo corpus (observed 78); floor catches a major projection drop (e.g. #4019), ceiling stays wide for parser growth

Function.note: all parsed function definitions across the corpus

WorkloadInstance.note: logical workload-instance nodes correlated from kubernetes_live facts

KubernetesWorkload.note: raw k8s Deployment/Service workload nodes; source of RUNS_IMAGE edges

Workload.note: logical workload groups from code-to-workload binding (RUNS_IN target)

CloudResource.note: cloud-registry/compute nodes from the AWS/Azure/GCP cassettes (observed 2); floor 1 catches total loss, ceiling wide for richer cloud cassettes

TerraformResource.note: Terraform state resources from terraform_state cassette; at least one ECS resource expected

OciImageManifest.note: OCI image manifests from oci_registry cassette; target of RUNS_IMAGE edges

PackageVersion.note: package versions from package_registry cassette; target of HAS_VERSION and DEPENDS_ON_PACKAGE

ExternalPrincipal.note: cross-account principals from aws_cloud S3 grant path; 0 if no cross-account grants in corpus

SecretsIAMServiceAccount.note: 0: secrets/IAM graph projection is gated OFF by default (ESHU_REDUCER_SECRETS_IAM_GRAPH_PROJECTION_ENABLED, ADR #1314); the corpus correctly produces none until that governed activation is recorded

SecretsIAMVaultAuthRole.note: 0: secrets/IAM graph projection is gated OFF by default (ESHU_REDUCER_SECRETS_IAM_GRAPH_PROJECTION_ENABLED, ADR #1314); the corpus correctly produces none until that governed activation is recorded

SecretsIAMVaultPolicy.note: vault policy nodes; 0 if no policy facts in corpus

SecretsIAMSecretMetadataPath.note: vault secret metadata path nodes; 0 if no secret-path facts in corpus

Platform.note: CI/CD and deployment platform nodes; 0 if platform-correlation collector not active

DocumentationSection.note: optional; present only if the docs collector is active for corpus repos

REPO_CONTAINS.note: every Repository→File edge (observed 78, tracks File); floor catches a major projection drop, ceiling wide for corpus growth

DEFINES.note: File→Function definition edges (observed 5; the demo fixtures are largely config, few code functions); floor 1 catches total loss

CALLS.note: inter-function call edges from code-call materialization; 0 if semantic extraction is not active

DEPENDS_ON.note: cross-repo Repository→Repository dependency edges from code-import and package-consumption domains (B-13 fix)

HAS_VERSION.note: Package→PackageVersion version edges from package_registry canonical writer

HANDLES_ROUTE.note: Function -[:HANDLES_ROUTE]-> Endpoint from the api-svc Flask route handlers; required as rc-8 (>=1, one per bound handler)

INVOKES_CLOUD_ACTION.note: Function -[:INVOKES_CLOUD_ACTION]-> CloudAction from the go_comprehensive cloud_actions.go AWS-SDK call site; required as rc-10

USES.note: WorkloadInstance→CloudResource workload-cloud binding; 0 if workload-cloud materializer not active for corpus

GRANTS_ACCESS_TO.note: CloudResource→ExternalPrincipal IAM grant edges from aws_cloud S3 external-principal path

CAN_ASSUME.note: IAM role assumption edges from cloud or vault collector

CAN_PERFORM.note: IAM capability edges from cloud permission projection

DEPLOYMENT_SOURCE.note: Repository that is the source of truth for a deployed workload

DISCOVERS_CONFIG_IN.note: config discovery edges from the Terraform or k8s collector

PROVISIONS_PLATFORM.note: Repository→Platform CI/CD platform provisioning; 0 if platform-correlation collector not active

SECRETS_IAM_USES_SERVICE_ACCOUNT.note: 0: secrets/IAM graph projection is gated OFF by default (ESHU_REDUCER_SECRETS_IAM_GRAPH_PROJECTION_ENABLED, ADR #1314); the corpus correctly produces none until that governed activation is recorded

SECRETS_IAM_AUTHENTICATES_TO_VAULT_ROLE.note: 0: secrets/IAM graph projection is gated OFF by default (ESHU_REDUCER_SECRETS_IAM_GRAPH_PROJECTION_ENABLED, ADR #1314); the corpus correctly produces none until that governed activation is recorded

SECRETS_IAM_GRANTS_SECRET_READ.note: vault_live policy→secret-path grant edges; 0 if no secret-path facts in the supply-chain-demo cassette

SECRETS_IAM_USES_VAULT_POLICY.note: 0: secrets/IAM graph projection is gated OFF by default (ESHU_REDUCER_SECRETS_IAM_GRAPH_PROJECTION_ENABLED, ADR #1314); the corpus correctly produces none until that governed activation is recorded

SECRETS_IAM_ASSUMES_IAM_ROLE.note: vault_live IAM role trust-chain edges; 0 if no assume-role facts in the supply-chain-demo cassette

required_correlations.description: At least one Repository(source) CORRELATES_DEPLOYABLE_UNIT Repository(deployment-config); confirms the deployable-unit correlation materializer ran
At least one Function RUNS_IN a Workload; confirms code-to-workload binding ran (RUNS_IN goes Function→Workload, not WorkloadInstance→CloudResource)
Cross-repo Repository DEPENDS_ON Repository edges exist; confirms the B-13 fix — repo_dependency shared_projection_intents drained correctly
At least one KubernetesWorkload RUNS_IMAGE an OciImageManifest; confirms the supply-chain-demo OCI image is correlated to the k8s workload
At least one AtlantisProject MANAGES a Directory; confirms the atlantis.yaml project-to-Terraform-dir governance edge formed for the terraform_comprehensive fixture
At least one AtlantisProject ATLANTIS_DEPENDS_ON another AtlantisProject; confirms the atlantis.yaml depends_on ordering edge formed
At least one AtlantisProject USES_WORKFLOW an AtlantisWorkflow; confirms the atlantis.yaml project->custom-workflow edge formed
At least one Function HANDLES_ROUTE an Endpoint; confirms the api-svc Flask route handlers bound to their Endpoint nodes (same fixture as rc-2 RUNS_IN; code-path edge, no new cassette)
A Function CALLS another Function; the code call graph projected from the comprehensive code fixtures.
A Class INHERITS another Class; class hierarchy projected from the code fixtures.
A Function REFERENCES a Struct; symbol reference projected from the Go fixtures.
A Repository DEFINES a Workload; workload definition projected from in-repo deploy manifests.
A Function INSTANTIATES a Class; construction edge projected from the code fixtures.
A WorkloadInstance is an INSTANCE_OF a Workload; runtime instance correlation (workload materialization, same machinery as rc-2).
A Workload EXPOSES_ENDPOINT an Endpoint; runtime endpoint exposure (workload materialization, same machinery as rc-2/rc-8).
A WorkloadInstance RUNS_ON a Platform; runtime placement correlation (workload materialization).
A Repository DEPLOYS_FROM another Repository; deployment-source correlation (same deployable machinery as rc-1).
A WorkloadInstance DEPLOYMENT_SOURCE a Repository; runtime-to-source correlation (workload materialization).
A Repository HAS_DEPLOYMENT_EVIDENCE an EvidenceArtifact; deployment evidence correlation.
An EvidenceArtifact EVIDENCES_REPOSITORY_RELATIONSHIP a Repository; evidence provenance edge.
A Class USES_METACLASS another Class; Python metaclass edge projected from the python fixtures.

A Function INVOKES_CLOUD_ACTION a CloudAction; the go_comprehensive cloud_actions.go AWS-SDK call site (s3.PutObject) resolves to the s3:putobject CAN_PERFORM catalog action. Regression guard for the filterUpsertRows action-field collision that previously dropped every such upsert.

A PackageDependency DEPENDS_ON_PACKAGE a Package; the package_registry supply-chain-demo cassette carries a package_version + package_dependency fact for github.com/acme/lib-common@1.0.0 declaring a direct dependency on github.com/acme/synthetic-dep, and the package_registry canonical writer materialises the dependency edge. Requires the non-git source-local projector path to run during the gate.

A Package HAS_VERSION a PackageVersion; the package_registry supply-chain-demo cassette's package + package_version facts project the version node and the HAS_VERSION edge via the deferred package_registry edge group (rc-9 NornicDB fix). Locks in the package_registry canonical version edge.

A PackageVersion DECLARES_DEPENDENCY a PackageDependency; the package_registry package_version + package_dependency facts project the dependency node and the DECLARES_DEPENDENCY edge via the deferred package_registry edge group. The version-side companion to rc-9's DEPENDS_ON_PACKAGE.

A Repository PROVISIONS_PLATFORM a Platform; the terragrunt_comprehensive fixture's HCL declares cluster/platform resources (EKS/VPC/RDS module families) that the reducer infrastructure-platform extractor recognises, and the InfrastructurePlatformMaterializer projects the Platform node plus the PROVISIONS_PLATFORM edge. The base terraform_comprehensive fixture alone does not emit it (verified count=0 without terragrunt), so this locks in the terragrunt/IaC platform-provisioning verb.

A GitlabPipeline DEFINES_JOB a GitlabJob; the terraform_comprehensive fixture carries a depth-0 .gitlab-ci.yml whose validate/plan jobs are declared by the single pipeline node. Static-parse edge, no cassette.

A GitlabJob NEEDS another GitlabJob; the terraform_comprehensive .gitlab-ci.yml terraform-plan job declares needs: [terraform-validate], resolved to the sibling job within the same file. Distinct NEEDS edge type, not the generic DEPENDS_ON.

A Repository DEPLOYS_FROM another Repository via Kustomize; the kustomize-deployable-overlay fixture's kustomization.yaml declares a remote Kustomize base github.com/acme/deployable-source//k8s, which the relationships engine emits as KUSTOMIZE_RESOURCE_REFERENCE evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DEPLOYS_FROM is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by ArgoCD (rc-19), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[KUSTOMIZE_RESOURCE_REFERENCE] to isolate the Kustomize deployment-source verb; the count is provably zero without the kustomize-deployable-overlay fixture.

A Repository DEPENDS_ON another Repository via an Ansible role reference; the ansible-platform-playbooks fixture's playbooks/site.yml applies the ansible-shared-roles role, which the relationships engine emits as ANSIBLE_ROLE_REFERENCE evidence resolving to the in-corpus ansible-shared-roles repository. DEPENDS_ON is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by package consumption (rc-3), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[ANSIBLE_ROLE_REFERENCE] to isolate the Ansible role-dependency verb; the count is provably zero without the ansible-platform-playbooks fixture.

A Repository DISCOVERS_CONFIG_IN another Repository via a Jenkins pipeline; the jenkins-ci-pipelines fixture's Jenkinsfile checks out github.com/acme/deployable-source, which the relationships engine emits as JENKINS_GITHUB_REPOSITORY evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DISCOVERS_CONFIG_IN is also emitted by Terraform, Terragrunt and GitHub Actions, so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[JENKINS_GITHUB_REPOSITORY] to isolate the Jenkins config-discovery verb; the count is provably zero without the jenkins-ci-pipelines fixture.

A Repository DEPENDS_ON another Repository via a Puppet module reference; the puppet-platform-modules fixture's Puppetfile declares an r10k mod acme-base whose :git source is github.com/acme/deployable-source, which the relationships engine emits as PUPPET_MODULE_REFERENCE evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DEPENDS_ON is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by package consumption (rc-3) and Ansible roles (rc-30), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[PUPPET_MODULE_REFERENCE] to isolate the Puppet module-dependency verb; the count is provably zero without the puppet-platform-modules fixture.

A Repository DEPENDS_ON another Repository via a Chef cookbook dependency; the chef-cookbooks fixture's Berksfile declares a Berkshelf cookbook acme-base whose git: source is github.com/acme/deployable-source, which the relationships engine emits as CHEF_COOKBOOK_DEPENDENCY evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DEPENDS_ON is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by package consumption (rc-3), Ansible roles (rc-30) and Puppet modules (rc-32), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[CHEF_COOKBOOK_DEPENDENCY] to isolate the Chef cookbook-dependency verb; the count is provably zero without the chef-cookbooks fixture.

A Repository DEPLOYS_FROM another Repository via a Helm chart dependency; the helm-umbrella-chart fixture's Chart.yaml declares a subchart dependency whose repository is github.com/acme/deployable-source, which the relationships engine emits as HELM_CHART_REFERENCE evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DEPLOYS_FROM is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by ArgoCD (rc-19) and Kustomize (rc-29), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[HELM_CHART_REFERENCE] to isolate the Helm chart-dependency deployment-source verb; the count is provably zero without the helm-umbrella-chart fixture.

A Helm chart template REFERENCES a values.yaml definition via .Values; the helm-template-chart fixture uses {{ .Values.<dotted.path> }} expressions that the parser resolves to the matching leaf keys in the same chart's values.yaml. templates/deployment.yaml contributes 7 usages (replicaCount, image.repository, image.tag, image.pullPolicy, service.port, resources.limits.cpu, resources.limits.memory) and the NESTED templates/config/configmap.yaml contributes service.type (8 total). The nested manifest is the regression guard for #4019: NornicDB previously dropped every file (and its entities) nested >=2 directories deep because the canonical directory write MATCH'd a parent directory MERGE'd in the same transaction; the minimum_count of 8 fails if that depth-2 projection regresses. rc-35 had also been dropped from this snapshot by a merge-order collision while the verify script still required it; it is restored here. Each usage becomes a HelmTemplateValueUsage content entity, each leaf a HelmValueDefinition content entity, and the projector structural-edge phase links usage to definition with a REFERENCES edge. REFERENCES is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted for code-symbol references (rc-13), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[HELM_TEMPLATE_VALUE_REFERENCE] to isolate the Helm template-value usage->definition verb; the count is provably zero without the helm-template-chart fixture (no other corpus repo defines the HelmTemplateValueUsage / HelmValueDefinition node labels).

A Repository DEPENDS_ON another Repository via a Salt gitfs formula reference; the salt-formulas fixture's master.yaml declares a Salt gitfs_remotes list whose first remote is github.com/acme/deployable-source, which the relationships engine emits as SALT_FORMULA_REFERENCE evidence resolving to the in-corpus deployable-source repository. DEPENDS_ON is a tool-agnostic edge also emitted by package consumption (rc-3), Ansible roles (rc-30), Puppet modules (rc-32) and Chef cookbooks (rc-33), so this correlation filters on evidence_kinds=[SALT_FORMULA_REFERENCE] to isolate the Salt gitfs formula-dependency verb; the count is provably zero without the salt-formulas fixture.

required_nodes.description: At least 10 File nodes carry a non-empty language (source_type); proves per-file language extraction (#4003) is operational. Presence-positive floor — legitimately language-less files (LICENSE, .gitignore) do not fail it, but a regression that stops populating language drops the count below the floor.
required_nodes.label: File

drain_assertions.description: B-7(a) drain checks; these validate queue state, not graph truth. Both queues must drain before B-7(b) graph assertions run.

fact_work_items.note: primary reducer queue table; must reach 0 before graph truth is checked

shared_projection_intents.note: all rows must have completed_at IS NOT NULL; the repo_dependency domain (B-13 #3859) is the primary gate — nonterminal intents here indicate the activation-gate bypass is not working or the drain budget was exceeded

find_cross_repo_dead_code.description: Cross-repo producer dead-code classification through MCP; asserts dead/live-by-consumer/unknown/suppressed bucket counts, bounded query shape, and truth envelope without provider keys.

GET /api/v0/status/operator-control-plan.description: Operator control plane status; confirms the status projection is operational

GET /api/v0/cloud/inventory.description: Cloud resource inventory readback (AWS/Azure/GCP cassettes); confirms cloud facts project to the inventory read surface.

GET /api/v0/cloud/resources.description: Cloud resources readback; confirms CloudResource projection is queryable.

GET /api/v0/images.description: Container image list (OCI/cloud cassettes); confirms OciImage projection is queryable.

GET /api/v0/incidents/PSCD1/context.description: Incident context for the pagerduty supply-chain-demo incident; confirms the incident fact is read-queryable.

GET /api/v0/work-items/evidence?limit=50.description: Work-item evidence for the jira supply-chain-demo scope; confirms work_item facts are read-queryable.

GET /api/v0/supply-chain/sbom-attestatio.description: SBOM attestation attachments for the synthetic supply-chain-demo SBOM document.

GET /api/v0/supply-chain/impact/findings.description: Supply-chain impact findings for the synthetic supply-chain-demo CVE.

GET /api/v0/observability/coverage/corre.description: Observability coverage correlations (tempo); confirms the observability coverage read surface is queryable.

GET /api/v0/iac/resources?limit=50.description: IaC resource list from the terraform/IaC corpus; confirms the IaC read surface is queryable.

GET /api/v0/documentation/facts?fact_kin.description: Documentation source facts; confirms the documentation read surface is queryable.

GET /api/v0/package-registry/packages?ec.description: Package registry packages (npm ecosystem); confirms package projection is queryable.

GET /api/v0/secrets-iam/posture-summary?.description: Secrets/IAM posture summary (governed projection, default-off per ADR #1314); confirms the read surface is mounted and returns a valid summary object.

GET /api/v0/ci-cd/run-correlations?limit.description: CI/CD run correlations for a scope; confirms the ci-cd read surface is mounted and queryable.

GET /api/v0/service-catalog/correlations.description: Service-catalog correlations for a scope; confirms the service-catalog read surface is mounted and queryable.

POST /api/v0/code/dead-code.description: Lower-level dead-code candidate scan; asserts the truth envelope, bounded scan metadata, and deterministic no-provider-key language maturity metadata.

POST /api/v0/code/dead-code/investigate.description: Prompt-facing dead-code investigation packet; asserts cleanup/ambiguous/suppressed bucket counts, coverage query shape, and truth envelope.

POST /api/v0/code/dead-code/cross-repo.description: Cross-repo producer dead-code classification; asserts dead/live-by-consumer/unknown/suppressed bucket counts, bounded query shape, and truth envelope without provider keys.

update_protocol.when: Update this snapshot when an intentional change to graph shape, node labels, relationship types, or canonical query responses lands. Do not update in response to transient corpus drift.
update_protocol.how: Run B-7 locally against the corpus, capture the actual counts and shapes, update the ranges, commit with a clear summary of what changed and why. The PR description must include before/after diffs of this file.
update_protocol.who: Snapshot updates require the same review bar as code changes. Silent updates that widen all ranges without explanation are not acceptable.
